changelog: Phase 8 visual unification: header collapses secondary nav into 'Ещё ▾' dropdown (single-row desktop, mobile-untouched); 13 page-specific stylesheets migrated to design tokens (KDS dark theme, all admin surfaces flow tenant brand); inline style='width' replaced with data-w attributes (CSP cleanup); Playwright visual regression suite. Critical hot-fix in this version: '.nav .nav-more' CSS specificity boost so the dropdown stays closed by default (prior 1.4.0+5697e19 shipped with the dropdown stuck open).
